sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: This website (the "Site") is maintained by BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH Research LLP. Panel ("Panel") refers to the BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH online and mobile phone adult panel.

sections.title: Use
paragraphs: Individuals may use this Site solely pursuant to the Terms and Conditions found here for their personal and non-commercial purposes. Any other use is prohibited. Becoming and being a member of the Panel is always free of charge. Participation in panel activities is always optional. Individuals may unsubscribe from the Panel at any time without charge or obligation.

sections.title: Membership Eligibility
paragraphs: BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH is open to individuals who are 15 years of age and older. Membership is specific to one individual with a unique e-mail address. A person may not appear as a member multiple times (e.g. under multiple identities) within the BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH Panel.

sections.title: Becoming a Panel Member
paragraphs: While some Site content is available to anonymous online visitors, other services and content may be restricted to use by members of the Panel. In order to become a member, an individual must provide truthful information when registering with the Panel and may not use any aliases or other means to mask his or her true identity.

If an individual provides any materially relevant information during sign-up that is found to be untrue, inaccurate, is not reasonably current nor complete, or BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH and/or one of its agents has reasonable grounds to suspect such information is untrue, inaccurate, not reasonably current or complete, BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH and/or its authorised agents have the right to terminate that individual's membership and refuse any and all current or future access to, or use of the Site, and may also, upon its sole discretion, declare any accumulated rewards or prizes otherwise creditable to the individual to be considered null and void.

sections.title: Initiating and Maintaining Panel Membership
paragraphs: In order to access the member's area for the BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH Panel, each Panel member during registration will be required to set up a user name. A password will be sent to you via email. You are responsible for the security of your password and will be solely liable for any use or unauthorised use under such password.

sections.title: Frequency of Survey Invitation and Participation
paragraphs: In their personal information contained in their online or mobile phone profile, panel members may indicate the maximum number of surveys they would like to complete in a month. Panel members may receive invitations to complete surveys frequently up to the self-imposed quotas they indicate or panel members may receive no invitations at all. After completing a given survey, a Panel member may experience a gap of some number of days before another survey invitation is offered.

While every attempt is made to send each Panel member survey invitations frequently up to the desired frequency, due to various factors, a given Panel member may not receive as many invitations to participate in surveys as they would like. Note that BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH is under no obligation to offer any specific or minimum number of survey invitations whatsoever.

sections.title: Unauthorised Use
paragraphs: An individual may not use any technological devices such as spiders, robots, or other automated data mining techniques to catalog, download, store, or otherwise reproduce or distribute content available on the Site. Neither is an individual permitted to manipulate the results of any Panel, poll, survey or prize draws on this Site or in the context of any activity engaged in as a consequence of Panel membership.

You may not take any action to interfere with the Site or any other user's use of the Site, including, without limitation, via means of overloading, "flooding", "mail bombing" or "crashing" the Site. You may not send unsolicited emails, including promotions and/or advertising of products or services. You may not frame portions of the Site within another website or alter the appearance of the Site. BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH will fully cooperate with any law enforcement authorities or court order, within the limits of any applicable law, requesting or directing BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH to disclose the identity of anyone posting any such information or materials.

sections.title: Updating Your Profile
paragraphs: Members of the BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH online and mobile phone Panel agree to promptly update any changes in personal and other information including but not limited to name, mailing address, phone number, e-mail address, and demographic information in the profile section after signing in with their member log-in information.

sections.title: Inactivity and Termination of Account
paragraphs: If a member does not participate in any survey during a selected extended time period, BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH may elect, in its sole discretion, to terminate his or her membership without notice. Other grounds for termination without notice include but are not limited to inadequate or untruthful survey responses and the Panel member having an undeliverable e-mail address or mailboxes that are full after multiple attempts to contact the member.

After membership is terminated, the terminated individual will stop being sent invitations to participate in surveys as a panel member. If through not receiving survey invitations or through some other means, a Panel member suspects that their membership has been terminated, they may contact BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH by writing to info@binaryandbeyondresearch.com. In general, in cases where terminations are due to inactivity, outstanding rewards (i.e. if beyond redemption threshold levels) may be claimed for 90 days following the date of termination. After that period, the individual's ability to claim an award will expire. As a condition of membership, you hereby waive and release any and all claims against BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH and its affiliates arising from or related to such membership termination or rewards expiration.

sections.title: Communication Between Panelists and BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH
paragraphs: By becoming a Panel member, an individual agrees to receive emails made on our behalf inviting the person to participate in surveys that are reasonably likely to match the experiences and background indicated during Panel sign-up. Participation in all surveys is always voluntary. From time to time, e-mail newsletters regarding relevant Panel or company news may be sent for your information as well.

E-mail links are provided on the site so that you may contact us directly with any questions or concerns you may have. Each e-mail we receive is read and responded to individually; please allow a maximum of 2–3 working days for us to get back to you.

sections.title: Membership Cancellation
paragraphs: If one so chooses, one can cancel their membership to the Panel at any time without charge or obligation. A member may simply sign in and click the "unregister" link to unsubscribe. Note that all accumulated points cannot be transferred or cashed out and will be permanently deleted.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All pages and content within this Site and related surveys, including but not limited to text, graphics, audio, video, photographs, surveys, logos, or other materials are the intellectual property of or are authorised for use by BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH and its licensors, business partners and affiliates, including all trademarks, service marks, copyrights, patents and trade secrets contained therein. You may not modify, copy, reproduce, create derivative works, republish, display, upload, post, transmit or distribute in any way content available on this site without the prior written consent of BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH.

sections.title: Disclaimer
paragraphs: The Site, including all content or services made available on or accessed through the Site, is provided "as is." To the fullest extent permissible by law, BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH makes no representations or warranties of any kind whatsoever for the content on the Site. Further, BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH disclaims any expressed or implied warranties, including, without limitations, non-infringement, title, merchantability, or fitness for a particular purpose.

BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH does not warrant that the functions contained in the Site or any materials or content contained therein will be uninterrupted or error-free, that defects will be corrected, or that the Site or the server that makes it available is free of viruses or other harmful components. In no event will BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH be liable under any theory of tort, contract, strict liability, or other legal or equitable theory for any lost profits, lost data, lost opportunities, costs of cover, exemplary, punitive, personal injury/wrongful death, special incidental, indirect or other consequential damages, each of which is hereby excluded by agreement of the parties regardless of whether or not either party has been advised of the possibility of such damages.

sections.title: Changes
paragraphs: All information posted on the Site is subject to change without notice. This includes all aspects regarding the Panel, including, but not limited to, details about the money redemption threshold and cash values as well as payment terms. In addition, these Terms and Conditions may be changed at any time without prior notice. We will make such changes by posting them on the Site and those who are affected by its terms are required to check website contents regularly to monitor changes.

sections.title: Indemnification
paragraphs: You agree to indemnify, defend and hold non-culpable BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH, its employees, directors, officers, agents, and representatives from and against any and all third-party claims, demands, liabilities, costs, or expenses, including reasonable attorney's fees, and expenses, arising from, or related to, any breach by you of any of these Terms and Conditions or applicable law.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH shall in no event be liable for the loss of profits, goodwill, or other special or consequential damages suffered by the members of the Site, clients, or others as a result of BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH's performance or non-performance under this agreement whether or not the possibility of such damages was disclosed to BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH or could have been reasonably foreseen.

BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH is neither responsible nor liable for, and respondent hereby waives any claim, action or remedy for, any damages, whether direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential, or losses that result from participation in the surveys offered to Panel members, or reliance on or use of information, services, or merchandise provided on or through the Site except where such liability is mandated by law. All users of the Site further acknowledge that BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH neither endorses the contents of advertisements or partner websites, nor assumes responsibility or liability for the accuracy of material contained therein, or any infringement of third-party intellectual property rights arising therefrom, or any fraud or other crime facilitated thereby.

sections.title: General Compliance with Laws
paragraphs: All individuals shall comply with all applicable laws, statutes, ordinances, and regulations regarding their use of the Site.

sections.title: Notices
paragraphs: Except as explicitly stated otherwise, any notices required hereunder shall be given by email to the appropriate email address under the "Contact" tab (in the case of BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH) or to the email address provided by the individual to BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH on their personal information profile. Notice shall be deemed given 24 hours after the email is sent unless the sending party is notified that the email address is invalid. Alternatively, BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH may give an individual notice by certified mail if the mailing address is known, postage prepaid, and the return receipt requested. In such case, notice shall be deemed given 3 days after the date of mailing.

sections.title: Severability
paragraphs: If any part of these Terms and Conditions shall be held or declared to be invalid or unenforceable for any reason by any court of competent jurisdiction, such provision shall be ineffective but shall not affect any other part of these Terms and Conditions.

sections.title: General
paragraphs: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed in all respects by the laws of India without giving effect to that country's provisions regarding conflicts of laws. If any provision of these Terms and Conditions is held to be invalid or unenforceable, such provision shall be struck and the remaining provisions shall be enforced. Headings are for reference purposes only and in no way define, limit, construe, or describe the scope or extent of such section.

Our failure to act with respect to a breach by you or others does not waive our right to act with respect to subsequent or similar breaches. This document sets forth the entire understanding and agreement between us with respect to the subject matter hereof.

sections.title: Questions
paragraphs: If one has questions regarding these Terms and Conditions please contact us by e-mail using the contact form provided on this website.

pageHero.title: Terms & Conditions
pageHero.subtitle: This website is maintained by BINARY AND BEYOND RESEARCH Research LLP. By accessing or using this site and its panel services, you agree to be bound by the following Terms and Conditions.
